signals.headline: Israel Announces Direct Negotiations with Lebanon on Hezbollah Disarmament | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Israel Announces Direct Negotiations with Lebanon on Hezbollah Disarmament | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu confirmed Thursday that Israel will begin direct talks with Lebanon focused on disarming Hezbollah and regulating peaceful relations, following Lebanon's requests; rockets were fired into Israel from Lebanon minutes after the announcement.[1]

signals.headline: US-Iran-Pakistan Talks in Islamabad Stretch 15+ Hours with No Deal | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran-Pakistan Talks in Islamabad Stretch 15+ Hours with No Deal | NO | MED confidence**  
Vice President JD Vance, envoy Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner held the first direct US-Iran face-to-face talks since 1979, covering Strait of Hormuz, Hezbollah, and uranium stockpiles, but no agreement was reached as of early Sunday local time.[3]

signals.raw:
OKC Thunder Clinch #1 West Seed & Best NBA Record; Key Stars Ruled Out for Regular-Season Finale vs. Suns | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2][4]

The Thunder have locked up the **#1 seed in the Western Conference** and the NBA's best regular-season record with two games left, confirming their top playoff position after intentionally resting starters in a 127-107 loss to the Nuggets on April 11 [1][2]
